course_title: ADVANCED COMPUTER CONTROL OF MACHINES AND PROCESSES
description: Digital control theory, design methodology, and techniques for controller implementation on digital computers. Advanced single and multi-axis motion generation algorithms. Multiple processor control systems. Multiple objective control systems for machinery guidance and manufacturing processes. Precision control. Knowledge of digital control [such asM E 447] strongly encouraged.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (M E 446orE C E 332) and graduate/professional standing
